title: Taylor Farms pulls iceberg lettuce from the US market after cyclosporiasis outbreak
summary: This all follows statements from the CDC and FDA saying the “explosive diarrhea parasite” outbreak has been linked to shredded iceberg lettuce served at Taco Bell locations across five states: Indiana, Kentucky, Michigan, Ohio, and West Virginia.
